Tan Grainy Leather with Gold Buckle · 26cm
The most elegant accordion bag series sac de jour, a timeless classic. Exquisite grainy cowhide with clear texture and a rich luster, very luxurious! The logo is very small, perfectly embodying the understated luxury style~

Size: 26x20.5x12.5cm
(Comes with a middle divider inside the 26cm size)

items.name_en: 🔥🔝New Arrival👏👉Black Oil Wax Leather/Gold🌈YSL New Bag King Bomb! Niki tripouch is truly amazing! Who gets it! This vintage oil wax leather is just on point! The distressed cracks act like a filter. The V-stitching is sharper than a regular quilted pattern. Thick gold chain + metal logo, full of vintage vibes but not too flashy. Medium size is just right for daily outings; fits compact powder, sunglasses, etc. Crossbody is a lazy sister, slung is a cool girl, with a suit is a career woman, with streetwear is a fashionista. Practicality and aesthetics both present.
items.name_cn:

items.name_en: 💰Black with Silver Buckle Oil Wax Leather · 28cm
items.name_cn:
💰Black with Silver Buckle Oil Wax Leather · 28cm
Niki's design is inspired by YSL's classic tuxedo, with a cool and casual overall style. The bag is made of oil wax calfskin, with natural wrinkled texture that exudes a vintage feel and is durable! The iconic metal logo has a vintage distressed texture, low-key and premium, as if silently telling the brand's fashion attitude!
Size: 28×20×8cm
Model: 633158

items.name_en: P【Genuine Leather】👍(Exclusive real-life background)Bea New Shopping Bag/Hobo Bag
items.name_cn:
P【Genuine Leather】👍(Exclusive real-life background)Bea New Shopping Bag/Hobo Bag
Many girls want to buy a large bag when autumn and winter arrive, and this Bea model is perfect. The leather texture is excellent from inside to out. The bag has two leather straps inside; when tied, it becomes a Hobo. The capacity is very sufficient, a 13-inch MacBook fits in!
With a soft body, the bag forms a natural indentation, giving a relaxed and free feeling, making the wearer look casual and effortless!
Model: 763435
Size: 50×28×18cm

items.name_cn:
Icy Plum Lambskin
woc Small Envelope Bag. When it comes to envelope bags, this one from Y must be mentioned! Made entirely of Italian lambskin, it features a structured shape and a comfortable touch! The detachable shoulder strap adds versatility; remove it to use as a clutch or evening bag. It has multiple card slots, making it incredibly practical. Carry your phone and cards, and this small bag is all you need for your day out!
Model: 393953
Size: 19x11.5x4cm
